title: Bridge Essay: Pathfinding: a neurodynamical account of intuition.

body.text: This bridge paper connects the esoteric/philosophical concept of **Dependent Arising** with mechanistic science from PubMed/MEDLINE.
**Bridge rationale:** Dependent arising — predictive processing, free energy principle, active inference as causal cognition.

**Pathfinding: aneurodynamical account of intuition.**. Commun Biol.. PMID: 40804280. DOI: 10.1038/s42003-025-08612-9. We examine the neurobiology of intuition, aterm often inconsistently defined in scientific literature. While researchers generally agree that intuition represents "an experienced-based process resulting in aspontaneous tendency toward ahunch or hypothesis," we establish afirmer neurobiological foundation by framing intuition evolutionarily as apathfinding mechanism emerging from the brain'soptimization of its relationship with the environment.
